title: More in Minecraft
description: A modpack adding a multitude of new content into Minecraft including structures, mobs, and items while hopefully retaining somewhat of a Vanilla feel.
body:
**Aiming to give players an opportunity to earn and find new things while retaining somewhat of a Vanilla like feel!**


Notable Features: Easily accessible minimap and world map, GUI and HUD updates, new mobs, new mob animations, new structures, new gear, with many more coming in the future! (with a hopeful FPS Increase).

This modpack is heavily inspired by DemonJoe's "Vanilla Perfected Modpack"
